work_completed: Fixed PostCSS XSS vulnerability (Dependabot alert #10) — bumped postcss from 8.4.31 to 8.5.14 via npm override in hosting/package.json
Verified 0 vulnerabilities after fix via npm audit

decisions_made.decision: Used npm overrides to pin postcss >= 8.5.10 as the fix for a transitive dependency
decisions_made.rationale: postcss is a transitive dependency (not a direct dependency) of hosting. The cleanest fix without forking or patching is to add an overrides entry in hosting/package.json so npm resolves postcss to a safe version (8.5.14) across all nested dependents.

handoff_record.next_agent_notes: PR must be reviewed and merged by Joshua W. Dorsey, Sr. After merge, the GOVERNANCE_SYNC_TOKEN secret should be configured (noted in THREAD-001 notes) so the sync-governance-public workflow can push to NeuroLift-Technologies/.github. All 10 Dependabot alerts (#1–10) are now in a fixed or safe state.
tests_run: npm audit (inside hosting/) — confirmed 0 vulnerabilities after applying override
